observations.note: Clean extraction of YAML parsing and brainstorm field logic to reusable reference files. Command maintains orchestration focus, skill handles implementation.
Reference file frontmatter standardization observed across command-error-handling.md and brainstorm-handoff-workflow.md. Both use: id, title, version, created, status fields.

Reference path format in ideate.md uses relative paths (references/command-error-handling.md). Consider standardizing to absolute paths from project root (.claude/skills/discovering-requirements/references/...) for consistency.
No dangling references, all cross-reference anchors verified, Section numbering in brainstorm-handoff-workflow.md matches forward-references in ideate.md.
Consider adding brief explanation in ideate.md Error Handling section (line 353) clarifying WHY error handling was extracted and what delegates to skill vs. command.
